name: AnAI
author: VeerGosai
description: 10L int5/int6 quantization, BigramHash(12288), TrigramHash(4096), SmearGate, OrthoInit, Muon WD=0.04, SWA(0.35), 5% pruning, sliding eval stride=64
techniques: 10 transformer layers, 512 dim, 8 heads, 4 KV heads (GQA)
Mixed quantization: int5 for MLP weights, int6 for attention (optional int4 for MLP fc via USE_INT4_MLP_FC=1)
BigramHash embedding (12288 buckets, dim=128) — increased from SOTA 10240
TrigramHash embedding (4096 buckets, dim=64) — NOVEL: captures 3-gram context
Orthogonal initialization with muP-scaled output projections
U-Net skip connections with learned skip weights
Muon optimizer with WD=0.04, momentum warmup 0.92->0.99
SWA start_frac=0.35, every=40 steps (more aggressive than SOTA)
5% magnitude pruning (vs SOTA 3%) for better compression
